heading: The Clem Miller Environmental Education Center; designation
label: 459c–6a The Clem Miller Environmental Education Center; designation
text: The Secretary shall designate the principal environmental education center within the seashore as “The Clem Miller Environmental Education Center”, in commemoration of the vision and leadership which the late Representative Clem Miller gave to the creation and protection of Point Reyes National Seashore.
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections.Section 4(b) of Pub. L. 94–544section 7(b) of Pub. L. 94–567
